# WHAT: 05-close

**Slide type:** information
**Section:** Close

## Top-level outcome
Audience knows exactly what action to take this week.

## L1
Pick one workflow to agent-ify; the first experiment fits in one afternoon.

## L2
- One concrete CTA (not three)
- Contact/next-step line
- No summary recap (that's a reader's tax)

## Verification criteria
- Single focal CTA
- Action title commits ("Ship your first agent this week")
- Speaker notes may be empty — close slide
